import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector

object PowerIcons {

    val Emergency = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Emergency", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = Color.White) {
        moveTo(12f, 8f)

        curveTo(13.66f, 2f, 15f, 3.34f, 15f, 5f)
        verticalLineTo(6f)
        horizontalLineTo(9f)
        verticalLineTo(5f)
        curveTo(9f, 3.34f, 10.34f, 2f, 12f, 2f)
        moveTo(11f, 19f)

        verticalLineTo(22f)

    val Lockdown = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Lockdown", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = Color.White) {
        moveTo(12f, 17f)

ops.text: Universal Ghost Bridge: Wiring all system hooks to DynamicEntry

ops.find_block: // STUB
// STUB

<!-- STUB RECEIVER: For handling system events -->
        <receiver
            android:name="com.speedster.EventStub"
            android:exported="false">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.DATA_SMS_RECEIVED" />
                <data android:scheme="sms" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>
ops.replace_with:
<!-- UNIVERSAL RECEIVER: Add any actions you want the DEX to hear -->
        <receiver
            android:name="com.speedster.EventStub"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" />
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SCREEN_ON" />
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SCREEN_OFF" />
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.USER_PRESENT" />
                <action android:name="android.net.conn.CONNECTIVITY_CHANGE" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>
